message:
chore(fcp-core): regenerate CBOR test vectors with updated keys

Test vector files regenerated with new cryptographic key material:
- enrollment/request_vectors.cbor: Updated signing, encryption, issuance keys
- simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor: Updated request IDs

These are binary CBOR test fixtures that change when key generation or
request ID generation runs. The semantic structure is identical; only
the specific key/ID values differ.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
